channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Temporary speed limit signs blocking new cycle path, 29th March
item.description:
There are a number of 30 mph signs that have been placed on the brand new cycle track blocking the track. How has this dangerous positioning of signs been allowed? These need to be removed urgently before they cause an accident!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Traffic signal head appears to be not working, 29th March
item.description:
The crossroads at the junction of St John’s Court and Gloucester Road in Cheltenham. Heading towards Cheltenham Railway Station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10-30, Millbrook Street, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Detached kerbstones outside 11 Holtham Avenue, 29th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holtham Avenue, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 29th March
item.description:
Pothole approx 10cm deep
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4cm pothole on pavement - trip hazard, 29th March
item.description:
On pavement outside number 11 Chatcombe Close GL53 8LT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Chatcombe Close, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: GL516EE. 3 metre length times whole width of west bound carriageway comprising eroded tarmac and deep potholes., 29th March
item.description:
Adjacent to 30 Hatherley Road GL51 6EE. An area of shattered, potholed and pitted carriageway which has had temporary repairs but has become much worse recently. I drive it nearly every day and due to the severity of the width and location of the potholes it impossible to avoid.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is quite a deep pothole., 29th March
item.description:
The pothole is on Farmfield Road, bordering 47 Chelmsford Avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 170, Farmfield Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover rattles noisily when driven over - was repaired 3/4 years ago but has failed again, 29th March
item.description:
Outside 16 Green Lane GL3 3QT
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Green Lane, Gloucester

item.title: Offensive graffiti on kids bus in playground, 29th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road closure signage left behind, 29th March
item.description:
Gloucester Road by station wall (opposite end of Roman Road). GTM sign, frame and sandbag left behind - relates to Severn Trent closure of road weeks ago. Items left behind / forgotten about / abandoned. ALSO plastic foot for temporary fencing - left behind MONTHS ago. Relates to closure of road last year for sub-station works at railway station. All left on pavement - moved by somebody (not me) to back of pavement, against station wall. All needs removing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Between CTFC ground and other end of Whaddon Road, 29th March
item.description:
Too many to list
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Whaddon Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham

item.title: Long uneven pothole been repaired before - breaking down needs fixing before it gets worse as drivers are not able to avoid, 28th March
item.description:
On the left hand side of railway bridge on Swindon Road heading towards Windyridge Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham

item.title: Hedge blocking view, 28th March
item.description:
Next to Kilkenny pub ///smallest.enhanced.hypnotist I’ve reported this previously. The photo is my view. It’s not safe. Workers were on that road a week ago. Job could have been done then to cut this back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 28th March
item.description:
Cheltenham Road, Longlevens opposite Pearman Briggs Caravans. Next to waste bin: 0273 Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection. Two bags, one containing general litter and the other cans/plastic bottles for recycling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Unsafe, uneven cracked pavement, 28th March
item.description:
Broken slabs, tree root disruption, cracks causing unsafe, uneven pavement. This is an access for my elderly mother to get to shops on Prestbury Road using her rollator walker or stick. The closer route via Overbrook Road is almost unusable for an elderly or disabled person. The state of the pavement is presenting a high risk to cause anyone to fall, particularly the elderly or disabled.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Cleevemount Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very uneven broken pavement, 28th March
item.description:
Broken slabs, tree root disruption, cracks and unsafe, uneven in the extreme. This is the closest access for my elderly mother to get to shops on Prestbury Road using her rollator walker or stick. The state of the pavement is presenting a high risk to cause anyone to fall, particularly the elderly or disabled.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Overbrook Drive, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 28th March
item.description:
Large outside number 21 beeches road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
